name: embodied-instruction-following
description: Improve robot understanding and execution of natural language instructions in physical environments
content:
## Understanding Embodied Instruction Following

### Core Concept

Improve robot understanding and execution of natural language instructions in physical environments

### Implementation

Implement the key technique by:
1. Processing inputs with appropriate encoders
2. Applying the core algorithm
3. Generating outputs and evaluating results

This skill provides foundations for Improve robot understanding and execution of natural language instructions in physical environments.

### When to Use

- Goal aligns with technique purpose
- Input data format matches requirements
- Evaluation metrics available

### When NOT to Use

- Requires domain-specific customization
- Data format incompatible
- Real-time constraints extreme
